title: Scout: count cards generating CAST_SPELL actions from fixed GameState
description:
Read-only scout task. For each card in the default active deck, construct a GameState and call generate_actions(state) directly. Report which cards produce at least one action with action_type == CAST_SPELL.

State setup per card:
- state.hand = [card]
- state.floating_mana = ManaPool(R=1)
- battlefield = [Permanent(card=get_card('Volcanic Island'), tapped=True)]
- state.vivi_on_battlefield = True
- state.vivi_available_as_creature_to_tap = True
- state.legendary_permanent_available = True
- state.land_play_available = False
- state.stack = []
- state.pending_choices = []
- all other fields: GameState defaults

Do NOT call simulate_run. Do NOT trigger Curiosity draw. Call generate_actions(state) directly.

Grep for ActionType, get_deck_list (or equivalent), Permanent, and GameState constructor before reading files. Use whatever function exists in card_db or data layer to enumerate all cards in the active deck.

Return ONLY a JSON result file at the path specified by the run harness. JSON structure:
{
  "total_cards_checked": N,
  "castable_count": M,
  "not_castable_count": K,
  "castable_cards": [
    {"card_name": "...", "cast_actions": ["description1", ...]}
  ],
  "not_castable_cards": ["card1", ...],
  "ambiguous_or_errors": [
    {"card_name": "...", "issue": "..."}
  ],
  "assumptions": "..."
}

This is read-only: no source file edits, no test creation. Temporary scratch execution is allowed.
acceptance_criteria: Result JSON contains total_cards_checked, castable_count, not_castable_count, castable_cards, not_castable_cards, ambiguous_or_errors, and assumptions fields.
Each castable card entry lists at least one cast_action description string.
